notes:
- New EQ-style multiband compressor: frequency spectrum with live analyzer, draggable per-band handles, per-band mute/solo/bypass, live gain-reduction metering, and makeup gain from -24 to +24 dB
- Licensing with a 14-day free trial and in-plugin key activation
- Send Feedback: report bugs or share ideas right from inside the plugin
- Factory Presets: a built-in category of ready-to-use presets
- Tutorial and About screen improvements
